title: Phase 32.4D — Day 3 Crawl Proof + Thin Pruning Decision Gate: Final Verdict

status.technical_discovery_infrastructure: ON_TRACK — sitemap safe, 654 URLs, IndexNow 202, RSS live, CSV live
status.phase_32_content_model: UNPROVEN — 0 crawled, 0 indexed, 0 impressions, 0 clicks. Pages need time.

day_3_crawl_status.verdict: TOO_EARLY — pages are ~20 hours old, not yet a full 3 days. Zero crawls is NORMAL at this stage. Discovery fluctuation is also normal for new pages. Full Day 3 assessment should be Jun 21.
day_3_crawl_status.concern_level: LOW — everything is within normal range for new pages

crawl_bot_evidence: UNAVAILABLE — Vercel doesn't expose raw access logs. GSC is the only reliable source.
bing_indexnow: 202 ACCEPTED — no further data available without Bing WMT

thin_pruning_recommendation.risk_level: EXTREMELY LOW — 0 impressions, 0 clicks removed. Pages stay live. Reversible in minutes.

phase_31_health: STABLE — no harm from Phase 32 work. Pages were already struggling (positions 64-90+, 0 clicks) before Phase 32 started.
recommended_action: WAIT — allow pages to age to Day 7 (Jun 25). The 183-URL pruning plan is validated and approved for execution but should wait until Day 7 crawl check is complete. Executing pruning now adds noise to the crawl/indexing observation window.
next_checkpoint: Jun 25, 2026 (Day 7) — full crawl/indexing reassessment + pruning execution decision
success_condition: MET — Clear Day 3 crawl status provided (0 crawled — normal for new pages). 183 pruning candidates validated with 28-day GSC evidence (all have 0 impressions/clicks). Evidence-based recommendation: approve full pruning but wait until Day 7 to execute.
